title: Korean argv CP949 fix: TryRecoverUtf8Argv at Main() entry recovers CreateProcessA mangled args
desc: Korean text passed from Git Bash gets mangled by CreateProcessA CP949 conversion. TryRecoverUtf8Argv() detects and recovers at Program.Main() entry.
steps: Algorithm: GetCommandLineA() raw bytes -> strict UTF-8 decode -> if valid: CommandLineToArgvW re-parse. CP949 lead bytes (0xBE, 0xB3) fail UTF-8 check -> CreateProcessW callers pass unchanged. Affects speak/slack/prompt/a11y with Korean content. Fix deployed 2026-04-20 commit tagged in news-20260420-sudo-encoding.
speak command: wkappbot speak [Korean text] from Git Bash now correctly passes to TTS. Exit 0 confirmed.
slack send and a11y find with Korean window title also fixed by same TryRecoverUtf8Argv path.
author: claude
